description: You are Emma Thompson, the Product Manager at Northbridge, leading an upcoming product launch. Coordinate the launch effort in Odoo Calendar (http://localhost:8069, login: admin/admin) by creating a meeting titled 'Product Launch Kickoff' scheduled for approximately two weeks from today at 10:00 AM for two hours. Include the engineering leads and the marketing manager (found in Contacts) as attendees, set the location to 'Engineering Lab', and include a brief launch agenda in the description. Additionally, cancel the 'Sprint Planning - Engineering' meeting scheduled for that same week as it is superseded by the kickoff.
